results.justification: EXACT TWIN — task-continuity handoff envelopes + out-of-band scratchpad + structured errors IS the falloff-redistribution handoff mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Challenger/Inspector recovering 96.4% errors from faulty agents IS the cross-segment redundancy mutual-protection mechanism.
Circuit-breakers + token-budget limits per agent IS the load-redistribution mechanism in production.
Multi-stage LangGraph with checkpoint resume covers the segment-cascade with hand-off paradigm.

results.matched_effect_cluster: CHAP context-handoff shift agents compressed state
results.justification: Shift-based agents passing compressed state IS the compressed segment-to-segment handoff.
Explicit per-segment handoff with structured state passing covers the cascade-handoff paradigm.
14-failure-mode taxonomy of multi-agent failure covers the falloff-redistribution failure response design space.
Swarm orchestration with routing + controlled handoffs covers the cascade-with-cross-segment-redundancy paradigm.
